ExtraProperties.Name: QualifiedApplianceReplacement_TCs
ExtraProperties.Label: Qualified Appliance Replacement
ExtraProperties.Text:
1. I certify that the appliances and products installed by the Qualified Appliance Replacement Program have been inspected for damage prior to installation and accepted for installation.

  2. The warranty for parts and labor related to the appliance(s) is valid for up to one (1) year from the date of installation by the third-party contractor. After this one-year period, the warranty for the appliance(s) will be provided and managed directly by the manufacturer. I acknowledge that I will receive the owner’s manual for the installed appliance(s), which includes contact information for the manufacturer for any future warranty claims or inquiries. For more information, contact 702-997-0022 Ext 110.

  3. I understand that in order to receive the new appliance(s) the Installer must remove and dispose of the old appliance(s). I am aware that in no circumstance will the old appliance(s) be left on the premises.

  4. In no event will the Installer repair any appliances or fixtures.

  5. I am fully aware that the Installer is not an employee of NVE and is a third-party contractor who has entered into a contract with NVE to provide certain services for the benefit of their customers. I elect to voluntarily participate in the Offer and assume all risk of loss, damage, or injury that sustained by property or by me in the performance of services by the Installer.

  6. To the maximum extent allowed by law, I acknowledge and agree that NVE (including their employees and contractors) shall not be liable for any loss, damage or injury that may be sustained by me or my property arising from or in connection with any act or omission of the Installer or the Installer’s agents or subcontractors in performing the Offer. I hereby waive any and all claims against NVE that may arise in connection with the Offer.

ExtraProperties.Name: PilotWxProgramParticipationAgreement_Checkbox
ExtraProperties.Label: Pilot Wx Program Participation Agreement
ExtraProperties.Text:
I understand that PowerShift by NV Energy (“NV Energy”) is conducting the Pilot Weatherization Program (“Pilot”). These Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) set forth the legally binding terms and conditions that govern my participation in the Pilot.

By applying for the Pilot, I, the customer (“I” or “me”) am accepting these Terms (on behalf of myself and/or my household), and I represent and warrant that I have the right, authority and capacity to enter into these Terms. I understand that I may not participate if I am not at least 18 years old. I will not apply for the Pilot if I do not agree to these Terms.

This Pilot is at no cost to me.

The company and/or the individual(s) providing the installation services (“Installer”) is a third-party contractor and is not an employee, affiliate or agent of NV Energy.

I authorize the Installer to enter my property and perform services to be rendered under the Pilot, and I understand that there is no guarantee of energy savings.

The Installer may install door weather-stripping, caulking, outlet gaskets, solar screens, water heater insulation blanket, pipe wrap for the water heater, thermostat shower valve with a 1.25 showerhead, and or thermostat tub diverter with a 1.5 thermostatic shut off shower head.

I understand that in order to receive the weatherization measure(s) the Installer must remove and dispose of any existing blemishes, minor defects, or obstructions on the structure.

I am aware that in no circumstance will any pre-existing material or hardware associated with the implantation of the weatherization measures be left on the premises.

In no event will the Installer repair any appliances or fixtures.

I elect to voluntarily participate in the Pilot and assume all risk of loss, damage, or injury that sustained by property or by me in the performance of services by the Installer.

To the maximum extent allowed by law, I acknowledge and agree that NV Energy (including their employees and contractors) shall not be liable for any loss, damage or injury that may be sustained by me or my property arising from or in connection with any act or omission of the Installer or the Installer’s agents or subcontractors in performing the Pilot. I hereby waive any and all claims against NV Energy that may arise in connection with the Pilot.

I agree to indemnify and release NV Energy, its respective subsidiaries, affiliates, officers and employees from all claims, demands, losses, damages, costs, expenses and liability (legal, contractual or otherwise), which arise from or are in any way connected with any: (1) injury to or death of persons, (2) injury to me or my landlord’s property, or (3) violation of any applicable laws, statutes or ordinances.

The Pilot and these Terms shall be construed and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the State of Nevada. Any action resulting from any breach of these terms and conditions on the part of NV Energy must be commenced within one year after the cause of action has accrued. Any suit, action, or proceeding arising out of or relating to the Pilot and these Terms shall only be filed in a federal court in Clark County, Nevada, unless the federal court lacks jurisdiction over the matter, in which case the party shall file the suit, action or proceeding in a court of competent jurisdiction in Clark County, Nevada. Each party waives any objection which it may have now or hereafter to the laying of the venue of such action or proceeding and irrevocably submits to the jurisdiction of any such state court in any such suit, action or proceeding.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, NV Energy and I waive any right NV Energy and I may have to a trial by jury in respect of litigation directly or indirectly arising out of, under or in connection with these Terms and the Pilot, and further waive any right to consolidate any action in which a jury trial has been waived with any other action in which a jury trial cannot be or has not been waived.

I agree NV Energy is not responsible for minor cosmetic scratches or dents that may arise during delivery from the manufacturer to NV Energy’s third-party contractor.

By signing below, I certify that I have read, understand, and agree to the above terms and conditions.

ExtraProperties.Name: AcknowledgementNote
ExtraProperties.Text:
By signing below,

  • I certify all the information provided in this Vehicle Inspection form is true and correct.
  • I understand submitting false information or not conducting the vehicle inspection may lead to disciplinary action, including and up to termination.
  • I understand that I am responsible to, and must report any vehicle damage and/or defective components immediately to my supervisor.
